title: AWeber vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare AWeber vs Sendinblue. See pricing, features, and which email marketing platform suits your needs best.
h1: AWeber vs Sendinblue: A Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: AWeber and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different needs. AWeber excels at simplicity for bloggers and solopreneurs, while Sendinblue offers a broader all-in-one CRM suite with SMS and transactional capabilities. This guide helps you choose the right tool based on your business requirements.

comparison_table.tool_a: Autoresponders, RSS-to-email, landing pages, AMP emails
comparison_table.tool_b: SMS, WhatsApp, transactional API, CRM, chat

choose_a_if: You prioritize simplicity and ease of use over advanced features
You're a blogger or solopreneur with a small subscriber base (under 500)
You need strong autoresponder and landing page capabilities
choose_b_if: You need an all-in-one CRM platform with email, SMS, and WhatsApp
You require transactional email API for e-commerce or SaaS applications
You want to maximize your free tier with up to 100,000 subscribers

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. AWeber wins for simplicity and ease of use, making it ideal for beginners and content creators. Sendinblue excels in features and versatility, offering SMS, CRM, and transactional capabilities at a competitive price. Compare based on your specific requirements.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, AWeber or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue offers better free tier value with 100,000 subscribers versus AWeber's 500. For paid plans, AWeber starts at $15/month while Sendinblue begins at $25/month. However, Sendinblue's free tier may eliminate the need for a paid plan entirely for smaller businesses.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to AWeber?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists and campaigns. Most email marketing tools support standard import formats (CSV, etc.), making migration straightforward. Plan ahead for any downtime and test your lists after import to ensure data integrity.
